basic_details.job_title: Bank of Baroda Financial Literacy Centre Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bank of Baroda Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Financial Literacy Centre Counselor (FLCC). Candidates with any Graduate Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Bank of Baroda official website bankofbaroda.bank.in.
